description: John Zenon, a 34-year-old abattoir worker, presents to the occupational health clinic with a 3-week history of undulating fever, profuse night sweats, and severe fatigue due to suspected Brucellosis from livestock exposure. As the occupational health physician, manage this case in GNU Health. Formally diagnose the patient with the appropriate ICD-10 code for the zoonotic disease, perform a clinical evaluation documenting the patient's fever, prescribe the standard dual-antibiotic therapy, order at least three baseline laboratory tests, and schedule a test-of-cure follow-up appointment. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
